Grants Archive

In 2023, Gitcoin launched our capital allocation protocol, Allo. Here you can find all Gitcoin Grants rounds run prior to our move to using the protocol

Previous Rounds

Scroll to view historical Gitcoin Grants rounds run prior to the launch of Allo

Explore

Gitcoin Grants on Allo

We created a helpful Data Hub for Gitcoin Grants rounds run on Allo
